x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Application health data enables DEX AI to diagnose app-specific issues such as Zoom quality and Office 365 performance. Without application monitoring, DEX AI diagnosis is limited to OS-level signals only.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: KB Articles with Raw URLs in Body
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Replace URL-dependent content with inline text — summarize what the link contains directly in the article body. Now Assist cannot follow hyperlinks. Target: ≤20% of published articles containing raw URLs.
